channel.title: Banking apps on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Banking apps on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to hide root and run banking apps on Android using Magisk.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-z5NBn7ii5Rc/Yi4zSe__njI/AAAAAAAAJps/v7ACrg5fPYYRjPghHfb9DaO1bND-MnWrwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1647194950186534-0.png" alt=""> Android powered smartphones by default lock write access to system files aka root level as altering them without knowledge will lead to soft and hard bricked devices which is sometimes irrepairable, however many people still want to access system level files as modifying them can get new features and for those android rooting is a process which provide superuser access known as root access in Android. But, rooting Android voids warranty which is why people stay away from rooting thier new smartphones as it increases chances of hacking, anyway usually developers and geeks root Android to gain advanced level access to dedug apps or new features etc, especially to install latest custom roms or root apps like 3c Tools, App2SD Pro - All In One Toolbox, Greenify etc.
